metadata.title: FSOT SMILES Lab Dataset
metadata.author: Damian Arthur Palumbo
metadata.description: Each record maps a physical/chemical constant to its FSOT formula — an algebraic expression of the five mathematical seeds (π, e, φ, γ, G) and their derived Layer 1/Layer 2 constants. Zero free parameters. Every prediction is within 5% of the published experimental value.

rows.canonical_function: hierarchical perception, planning, abstraction, and language
predictive error correction, timing, and coordination
wakefulness, autonomic stability, and gain modulation
episodic encoding, sequence binding, and spatial context
policy selection, habit formation, and reinforcement gating

rows.organization: relay nuclei and reticular gating shell
rows.canonical_function: sensory routing, attention gating, and corticothalamic coordination
metabolic coupling, neurotransmitter clearance, and vascular mediation
latency control, synchrony support, and signal insulation
salience tagging, threat evaluation, and affective learning
homeostasis, pruning, debris response, and inflammatory monitoring

formulas.purpose: Collapse each of 20 amino acids to a balanced-ternary signature [Charge, Polarity, Volume] in {-1, 0, +1}^3. This is the bedrock — every downstream layer reads from this table.
Map each AA to four continuous FSOT scalars: hydrophobicity_fsot, volume_fsot, charge, dipole_moment.
Strongest covalent interaction in the model — locks Cys-Cys pairs into closed loops, dominates crambin and many extracellular proteins.
formulas.current_form: fsot_chemical_interaction returns PHI.powi(6) when both AAs are Cys.

formulas.purpose: Burial term — two hydrophobic residues attract in aqueous environment (water entropy gain); hydrophobic + hydrophilic repels.
formulas.current_form:
h_term = ((h1 - phi)/phi) * ((h2 - phi)/phi)
where h_i = hydrophobicity_fsot of residue i, phi acts as neutral threshold.

formulas.purpose: Coulomb-like: opposite charges attract, same charges repel.
formulas.current_form:
elec_term = -q1 * q2 * E
where q_i in {-1, -0.5, 0, +0.5, +1}.

formulas.purpose: Weak attractive contribution from co-aligned polar moments.
formulas.current_form: dip_term = sqrt(mu1 * mu2) / (gamma * pi * e * e)

formulas.purpose: Flory random-walk baseline — residues close in sequence are close in 3D regardless of identity.
Gate the chemistry term: short-range pairs are already covered by backbone, chemistry should peak at medium/long range where it adds information.
formulas.current_form:
env = s / (s + pi*e)
where s = sep, pi*e ~= 8.54.

formulas.purpose: Set the absolute weight of the chemistry term relative to backbone, helix, sheet, region-pair layers.
α-helix is a 3.6-residue-per-turn coil — residues at i, i+3, i+4, i+7 sit close in 3D. Boost predicted proximity for such pairs when both prefer α.
formulas.current_form:
if sep in {3, 4, 7}: bonus = (p_alpha_i * p_alpha_j)^1.5 / e
else 0

formulas.purpose: β-sheet pairs (parallel and antiparallel strands) bring residues from distant parts of the sequence into close 3D contact.
formulas.current_form:
if sep < 3: 0
else: bonus = (p_beta_i * p_beta_j) * 1 / (1 + ln(sep/pi).clamp(>=0)) / phi

formulas.purpose: Collapse per-residue α/β/coil propensities into contiguous runs (≥3 residues) — the FSOT trinary triadic-collapse mechanism. Only collapsed regions can engage in cross-region long-range coupling.
formulas.current_form:
for each residue: collapse to H/E/C using gate p_dominant > 1/e AND p_dominant > the other.
A region = ≥3 consecutive residues of same kind.

formulas.purpose: Long-range bonus for residue pairs that belong to two DIFFERENT same-kind collapsed regions (helix-helix packing or strand-strand pairing). The FSOT trinary higher-order coupling.
Threshold above which sequence separation counts as 'long range' for the region-pair layer.
Final layered sum producing matrix[i][j] = predicted spatial proximity (larger = closer).

proposed_formulas.purpose: Helix-helix packing register — residues at positions 0,3 mod 7 face the partner helix in coiled-coils and bundles.
β-strand pairing register — antiparallel vs parallel, with specific residue-to-residue correspondence.
Suppress disulfide for sequence separations that are sterically impossible (sep < 4) or entropically penalized (sep > 50).

observables.name: Penrose process angular momentum extraction max

FSOT Micro LM - v1 Ground State
